name: ajazz-reverse-driver
description: Reverse-engineered, self-owned Ajazz WebHID driver (protocol layer + Electron host reusing the existing UI)

scripts.package: npm run build && npm run copy-ui && electron-packager . "AJAZZ Reverse Driver" --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=dist-pkg --overwrite --ignore="^/src" --ignore="^/index.core" --ignore="^/extract_models.py" --ignore="^/dist-pkg"
